case_title: FOSTER, LACEY JR. VS FAIRLEY, MONICA D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FOSTER, LACEY JR. AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, MONICA D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
